_comment: Used by: npm run git:remotes. homeRepository sets home root origin for npm run pr. Override: P31_HOME_GITHUB=org/repo. If GitHub 404s while logged out, repo may be private — confirm slug or set-url if push fails. hubCanonical documents the public-facing clone story for p31ca hub code (see docs/P31-GITHUB-ORG-REPOS.md).

hubCanonical.standaloneHubRepositoryRole: May exist as a mirror, deploy slice, or historical split. Contributors should treat **p31labs/andromeda** at **04_SOFTWARE/p31ca** as the canonical working tree unless the standalone repo README explicitly states it is the integration branch of record.
